feed.title: App Store Discounts（PT）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:206976450490868736+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:206907475259680768+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1994 201 1793 90
PT 1709 144 1565 16

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(PT)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Tokyo Train!
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：2,99 € → 0,49 € [0,29 € ~ 2,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,49 €

Application Description

Façam os comboios japoneses funcionar! Não é necessário nenhum conhecimento ferroviário para jogar "Tokyo Train!". Este jogo é um jogo de cérebro com regras simples, mas requer muito poder cerebral. Os clientes esperam na estação que os comboios cheguem para os levar aos seus destinos. Comece os comboios e transporte os seus clientes. Ganharão dinheiro por cada passageiro que embarcar num comboio. Ajuste o intervalo entre as viagens e o número de vagões para alcançar a maior receita. A partida dos comboios custa dinheiro. Se enviar demasiados comboios e a taxa de embarque baixar, perderá as suas receitas. O método de operação é muito fácil e as regras são simples. Só tem de ajustar o número de vagões e fazer com que os comboios partem na melhor altura. À medida que o jogo avança, as tarifas expressas também aparecerão. Não é necessário qualquer conhecimento técnico. Tanto as pessoas que gostam de comboios como as pessoas que gostam de jogos podem rapidamente compreender e desfrutar do jogo. Não há compras em espera. Não há anúncios. Por favor, concentrem-se no jogo. Partilhe os seus resultados operacionais nas redes sociais.

entry.title: Clank!
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：11,99 € → 7,99 € [7,99 € ~ 11,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：7,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Sunken Treasures：9,99 €
  • Mummy's Curse：9,99 €

Application Description

Aventure-se roubando no premiado jogo de tabuleiro! Uma nova aventura começa! "Clank!, o icônico jogo de aventura de tabuleiro de construção de baralho desafia os ladrões ousados a se infiltrarem no covil do dragão, roubar um de seus preciosos artefatos e escapar antes de virar churrasco! Juntando mais fãs e prêmios ao redor do mundo, Clank! é um dos mais amados jogos de tabuleiro moderno com muitas expansões e adaptações para a diversão dos jogadores." O quão fundo você irá se aventurar? "Quanto mais fundo for, mais valiosos serão os tesouros que encontrar... mas será mais difícil ainda escapar! Então seja breve e não faça barulho: Um passo em falso e CLANK! Cada barulho pode chamar a atenção do dragão. Você está competindo contra seus amigos ladrões para reivindicar o prêmio mais valioso... mas você só terá o saque se conseguir escapar das profundezas com vida!" Escolha seu caminho "Você vai precisar de um bom par de botas, uma espada afiada e todas suas habilidades de ladino para sobreviver na masmorra. Ao longo do caminho, você irá adquirir novos itens, perícias e aliados para te ajudar a conquistar a vitória! Misturando construção de baralho e exploração, Clank! oferece uma aventura de exploração de masmorra única a cada vez que jogar." Diversas formas de jogar "Aprenda a usar as cordas no tutorial guia e aprimore suas habilidades ao coletar conquistas e concluir desafios. Jogue em multiplataforma com os amigos ou compita em novos e empolgantes Assaltos que colocam você contra jogadores de todo o mundo! Seja como for que você entrar na masmorra: boa sorte... você vai precisar!"

entry.title: Dune: Imperium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：11,99 € → 7,99 € [7,99 € ~ 11,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：7,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Dune: Imperium - Rise of Ix：9,99 €
  • Dune: Imperium - Immortality：9,99 €

Application Description

Immerse yourself in the world of Dune. Experience the ultimate blend of strategy and intrigue as you navigate the treacherous landscapes of Arrakis in the award-winning board game Dune: Imperium! Battle online, locally with AI, or against the formidable House Hagal. Earn Achievements that showcase your prowess as a leader. Embark on more than a dozen Challenges that will test your wit and cunning. Compete for badges in the rotating Skirmish Mode where no two games are the same! Control the Spice. Control the Universe. Arrakis. Dune. Desert Planet. Raise your banner above the vast wasteland before you. As the Great Houses of the Landsraad marshal their forces and their spies, whom will you influence, and whom will you betray? A tyrannical Emperor. The secretive Bene Gesserit. The shrewd Spacing Guild. The ferocious Fremen of the Deep Desert. The power of the Imperium can be yours, but war is not the only way to claim it. Dune: Imperium blends deck-building and worker placement in a deeply thematic new strategy game where the fate of the Empire hangs on your decisions. Will you seek political allies or rely upon military might? Economic strength or subtle intrigues? A council seat… or a sharpened blade? The cards are dealt. The choice is yours. The Imperium awaits.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Ark Nova
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：11,99 € → 8,99 € [8,99 € ~ 11,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：8,99 €

Application Description

Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects in an acclaimed strategy board game. In Ark Nova, you will plan and design a modern, scientifically managed zoo. With the ultimate goal of owning the most successful zoological establishment, you will build enclosures, accommodate animals, and support conservation projects all over the world. Specialists and unique buildings will help you in achieving this goal. At the heart of Ark Nova are 255 cards featuring animals, specialists, unique enclosures, and conservation projects, each with a particular ability. Use them to increase the appeal and scientific reputation of your zoo and to collect conservation points. Each player has a set of action cards, which you will use and upgrade to carry out your plans. Each player has a set of five action cards to manage their gameplay, and the power of an action is determined by the slot the card currently occupies. The cards are: BUILD: Allows you to build standard or special enclosures, kiosks, and pavilions. ANIMALS: Allows you to accommodate animals in your zoo. CARDS: Allows you to gain new zoo cards (animals, sponsors, and conservation project cards). ASSOCIATION: Allows your association workers to carry out different tasks. SPONSORS: Allows you to play a sponsor card in your zoo or to raise money. With high replayability and rich components, Ark Nova provides a remarkable gaming experience that will bring the game to the table again and again.

entry.title: Root Board Game
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：9,99 € → 5,99 € [3,99 € ~ 9,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：5,99 €

Compras integradas

  • The Riverfolk Expansion：9,99 €
  • Root: The Underworld Expansion：9,99 €
  • Exiles & Partisans & Vagabonds：8,99 €
  • The Clockwork Expansion：6,99 €
  • Root: The Marauder Expansion：9,99 €
  • Hirelings & Landmarks：9,99 €

Application Description

Play the digital adaptation of the beloved tabletop board game. Root is a game of adventure and war where 2 to 4 players battle for control of a vast wilderness. The nefarious Marquise de Cat has seized the great woodland, intent on harvesting its riches. Under her rule, the many creatures of the forest have banded together. This Alliance will seek to strengthen its resources and subvert the rule of Cats. In this effort, the Alliance may enlist the help of the wandering Vagabonds who are able to move through the more dangerous woodland paths. Though some may sympathize with the Alliance’s hopes and dreams, these wanderers are old enough to remember the great birds of prey who once controlled the woods. Meanwhile, at the edge of the region, the proud, squabbling Eyrie have found a new commander who they hope will lead their faction to resume their ancient birthright. The stage is set for a contest that will decide the fate of the great woodland. It is up to the players to decide which group will ultimately take root.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 召喚騎士團
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • 劇情模式：5,99 € → 2,99 € [2,99 € ~ 5,99 €]
  • 自由模式：5,99 € → 2,99 € [2,99 € ~ 5,99 €]
  • 故事模式+自由模式合集：9,99 € → 5,99 € [4,99 € ~ 9,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • 劇情模式：2,99 €
  • 自由模式：2,99 €
  • 故事模式+自由模式合集：5,99 €

Application Description

'Call of Knights' is a pixel-style RPG card game developed by Olive Panda Studio. The game consists of two main parts: 'Song of the Knights' and 'Shining Stars' . Players can access the full game content through free download and optional in-app purchases. 【In-App Purchases】 Full Content Unlock: $8.99 USD Story Mode of 'Song of the Knight': $4.99 USD Free Mode of 'Shining Stars': $4.99 USD Both modes support free trial before purchase. 'Song of the Knights' can be played for free up to the end of Chapter 2, while 'Shining Stars' can be experienced freely for one in-game year. Note: Prices may vary depending on local exchange rates. Song of the Knights: This story mode is adapted from Nobel Prize-winning author Henryk Sienkiewicz's 'The Teutonic Knights'. The gameplay combines card-based battles with RPG character development, featuring a companion skill combo system where different cards trigger unique partner skills, allowing players to build various strategic decks. Along the journey, players will meet and recruit many companions, embarking on a grand and epic adventure. Shining Stars: Set in the magical continent of Antana, this mode features six culturally distinct nations. Players take on the role of a minor lord from one of the kingdoms. As the demon realm prepares to invade, players must travel the land, recruit companions, form their own knight order, and grow stronger to defend the front lines of humanity. 【Device Support】 iOS 10.0 or later Devices with 3GB RAM or more iPhone 7 or newer iPad Air 3 or newer 【Contact Us】 If you need help during the game or encounter any issues, feel free to contact us via email. Official Email: knight@longyougame.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Island Story: 100 Days
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：2,99 € → 1,99 € [0,99 € ~ 2,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

You wake up on the beach of a mysterious tropical island after a shipwreck. Survival is your only goal: build shelter, craft tools, find food and fresh water, and uncover the island's hidden secrets! ■ Simple Controls • Tap to move and gather resources. ■ Survival • Eating wild fruits alone won't satisfy your hunger. • Catch fish in a mini-game, or craft traps for meat. ■ Realistic Health System • Staying healthy is a constant struggle. • Manage a complex system of needs: weight, wounds, hunger, thirst, energy, body temperature, insect bites… ■ Upgrade Your Camp • Gather resources to craft tools and build furniture. ■ Dynamic Weather • Changing weather limits your movements and can disrupt daily plans. ■ Self-Sufficiency • Learn to grow crops, raise goats, and bake bread from scratch. ■ Relaxation • Immerse yourself in natural white noise. --------- No in-app purchases · No ads

entry.title: Sun Seeker - Tracker & Compass
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：12,99 € → 9,99 € [9,99 € ~ 12,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：9,99 €

Application Description

Sun Seeker is a comprehensive solar tracking & compass app. It shows the sun’s hourly direction intervals, its equinoxes, winter & summer solstice paths, sunrise & sunset times, twilight times, shadowed periods, UV Index, solar irradiance, golden and blue hours, eclipses & more. The app allows you to add sun-event notifications & has a widget and watch app showing the day’s solar data & position on an arc. The 3D View shows the solar direction for each sunlight hour. Sun Seeker has both a flat compass view & a 3D Augmented Reality (AR) view to show the solar position & path. The app is useful for - ▶ Photographers- to plan shoots according to the golden hour or blue hour & optimal sunlight conditions, sunrise & sunset times & directions. ▶ Cinematographers- enables you to find the solar exposure, directions, shadow, sunrise & sunset times for any location. ▶ Real Estate Buyers- can use the app before buying a property to check the sun's path & to find the solar exposure of properties. ▶ Drivers - Sun Seeker lets you track the sun path & movement during the days & helps drivers know the sun position to find how long the car will remain in the shade at any given parking spot. ▶ Campers & Picnickers- for anyone planning a day out, this app will help in finding where to camp, sit or pitch an umbrella depending on the sunlight & sun direction. ▶ Gardeners- Sun Seeker can also help with finding optimal planting locations & seasonal sunlight hours as a sunrise calendar ▶ Architects & Surveyors- for visualising the spatial variability of the solar angle throughout the year & using the compass app as a sun surveyor & calendar to determine the sunlight directions. Main Features * Sun Seeker is a sun locator which uses GPS, magnetometer & gyroscope to find the correct solar position & sun path for your current location. * Flat compass view shows current solar position, diurnal solar angle & elevation (separated into day & night segments), sun shadow length ratio, atmospheric path thickness. * 3D augmented reality (AR) camera overlay view shows the sun's current position, and it's path with hour points marked. You can scroll through time to preview changes throughout the year or day, and an optional pointer to guide you towards the current location of the sun & help you find the sun's direction. * Map view shows solar direction arrows, sun path & elevations for each hour of the day. * Choose any date to view sun position & path on that day. You can view sunset & sunrise times for each day as well. * Choose any location on earth (includes 40,000+ cities or custom locations available offline, as well as a comprehensive online map search capability). * Get additional details including sunrise, sunset & culmination times, maximum elevation, civil, nautical & astronomical twilight periods of the sun. * Optional device notifications for all manner of sun-related periods & events, such as golden hour or blue hour, various twilight periods, or sun crossing a given compass heading or elevation. The Sun Seeker app has been featured in numerous high-profile blogs, websites & publications, including Wall Street Journal, Washington Post, Sydney Morning Herald etc. "Truly amazing", "Incredible", "Brilliant - the most genuinely useful application of augmented reality - ever!" Check out our YouTube video here: https://bit.ly/2Rf0CkO Simply search YouTube for "Sun Seeker app" to find many videos, websites & blogs created by our enthusiastic users FAQs * See https://bit.ly/2FIPJq2 - also easily accessible from the app's info screen Note * The compass accuracy depends on having an undistorted magnetic field around your device. If you use it close to metallic objects or electrical equipment, directional accuracy may be impaired. The device’s compass accuracy can be optimised by calibrating it prior to use. See app’s FAQs for more help.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Be Focused Pro: Timer Pomodoro
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：14,99 € → 8,99 € [8,99 € ~ 14,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：8,99 €

Application Description

Manter-se na tarefa parece ser um verdadeiro desafio para a nossa geração ligada às telas. O "Be Focused" permite realizar tarefas dividindo-as em intervalos discretos, separados por pequenas pausas. É uma maneira surpreendentemente eficaz de manter a motivação e o foco. Crie tarefas, configure pausas e monitore seu progresso ao longo do dia, semana ou período personalizado. Use o Be Focused no seu iPhone, iPad ou Mac — tudo permanece perfeitamente sincronizado. Gerenciamento de Tarefas • Crie e gerencie tarefas • Adicione notas e datas de vencimento às tarefas • Organize tarefas com etiquetas e filtros • Cole listas de tarefas de outros aplicativos Controle do Cronômetro • Inicie, pause ou pule intervalos • Início automático do próximo intervalo (opcional) • Planeje os intervalos necessários para concluir as tarefas e acompanhe a precisão • Gerencie intervalos concluídos Personalização do Cronômetro • Defina durações para sessões de trabalho, pausas curtas e longas • Determine o número de intervalos antes de uma pausa longa • Defina uma meta diária de intervalos concluídos • Atribua diferentes configurações de cronômetro para tarefas individuais Relatórios • Visualize relatórios detalhados para monitorar seu progresso • Exporte seus dados em formato CSV Sons e Notificações • Som de tique-taque do cronômetro com frequência ajustável • Variedade de sons de alarme • Notificações interativas • Volume ajustável para alarmes e cronômetro Integração • Sincronize entre todos os seus dispositivos (iPhone, iPad, Mac) * • Integração com o Focus Matrix para gerenciar tarefas usando o princípio urgente/importante ** • Integração com o aplicativo Atalhos para automatizar fluxos de trabalho Acesso Rápido • Widgets para a Tela Bloqueada e Tela de Início • Atividades ao Vivo para a Tela Bloqueada e Ilha Dinâmica • Controle para iniciar ou parar o cronômetro a partir da Tela Bloqueada, Central de Controle ou Botão de Ação Automação • Integração com o aplicativo Atalhos (controle tarefas e cronômetros via aplicativo Atalhos) • Automatize a execução de Atalhos em eventos no aplicativo Be Focused Compatibilidade de Dispositivos • Compatível com Apple Watch • Também disponível para Mac • Suporte aos modos Escuro e Claro * A sincronização com o Mac requer o Be Focused Pro para macOS, vendido separadamente. ** A integração com o Focus Matrix requer a versão Pro do Focus Matrix, vendida separadamente.

entry.title: Sun Seeker - Tracker & Compass
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：12,99 € → 9,99 € [9,99 € ~ 12,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：9,99 €

Application Description

Sun Seeker is a comprehensive solar tracking & compass app. It shows the sun’s hourly direction intervals, its equinoxes, winter & summer solstice paths, sunrise & sunset times, twilight times, shadowed periods, UV Index, solar irradiance, golden and blue hours, eclipses & more. The app allows you to add sun-event notifications & has a widget and watch app showing the day’s solar data & position on an arc. The 3D View shows the solar direction for each sunlight hour. Sun Seeker has both a flat compass view & a 3D Augmented Reality (AR) view to show the solar position & path. The app is useful for - ▶ Photographers- to plan shoots according to the golden hour or blue hour & optimal sunlight conditions, sunrise & sunset times & directions. ▶ Cinematographers- enables you to find the solar exposure, directions, shadow, sunrise & sunset times for any location. ▶ Real Estate Buyers- can use the app before buying a property to check the sun's path & to find the solar exposure of properties. ▶ Drivers - Sun Seeker lets you track the sun path & movement during the days & helps drivers know the sun position to find how long the car will remain in the shade at any given parking spot. ▶ Campers & Picnickers- for anyone planning a day out, this app will help in finding where to camp, sit or pitch an umbrella depending on the sunlight & sun direction. ▶ Gardeners- Sun Seeker can also help with finding optimal planting locations & seasonal sunlight hours as a sunrise calendar ▶ Architects & Surveyors- for visualising the spatial variability of the solar angle throughout the year & using the compass app as a sun surveyor & calendar to determine the sunlight directions. Main Features * Sun Seeker is a sun locator which uses GPS, magnetometer & gyroscope to find the correct solar position & sun path for your current location. * Flat compass view shows current solar position, diurnal solar angle & elevation (separated into day & night segments), sun shadow length ratio, atmospheric path thickness. * 3D augmented reality (AR) camera overlay view shows the sun's current position, and it's path with hour points marked. You can scroll through time to preview changes throughout the year or day, and an optional pointer to guide you towards the current location of the sun & help you find the sun's direction. * Map view shows solar direction arrows, sun path & elevations for each hour of the day. * Choose any date to view sun position & path on that day. You can view sunset & sunrise times for each day as well. * Choose any location on earth (includes 40,000+ cities or custom locations available offline, as well as a comprehensive online map search capability). * Get additional details including sunrise, sunset & culmination times, maximum elevation, civil, nautical & astronomical twilight periods of the sun. * Optional device notifications for all manner of sun-related periods & events, such as golden hour or blue hour, various twilight periods, or sun crossing a given compass heading or elevation. The Sun Seeker app has been featured in numerous high-profile blogs, websites & publications, including Wall Street Journal, Washington Post, Sydney Morning Herald etc. "Truly amazing", "Incredible", "Brilliant - the most genuinely useful application of augmented reality - ever!" Check out our YouTube video here: https://bit.ly/2Rf0CkO Simply search YouTube for "Sun Seeker app" to find many videos, websites & blogs created by our enthusiastic users FAQs * See https://bit.ly/2FIPJq2 - also easily accessible from the app's info screen Note * The compass accuracy depends on having an undistorted magnetic field around your device. If you use it close to metallic objects or electrical equipment, directional accuracy may be impaired. The device’s compass accuracy can be optimised by calibrating it prior to use. See app’s FAQs for more help.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Plague Inc.
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • Pacote pragas：14,99 € → 11,99 € [11,99 € ~ 14,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：0,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Pacote de Vírus Necroa：1,99 €
  • Desbloquear 7 Pragas Padrão：2,99 €
  • Desbloquear de Verme Neurax：1,99 €
  • Desbloquear Todos os Genes：8,99 €
  • Pacote pragas：11,99 €
  • Desbloquear Vírus：0,99 €
  • Pacote Cenário：2,99 €
  • Pacote de expansão Gripe símia：1,99 €
  • Pacote de Praga das Sombras：1,99 €

Application Description

Você consegue contaminar o mundo? Plague Inc. é uma mistura única de alta estratégia e simulação terrivelmente realista. Seu agente patogênico acabou de contaminar o 'Paciente zero'. Agora você deve acabar com a história da humanidade evoluindo para uma mortal Praga global, enquanto se adapta a tudo que a humanidade pode fazer para se defender. Brilhantemente executado, com jogabilidade inovadora e construido especificamente para iPhone e iPad, Plague Inc. é uma evolução do gênero de estratégia e leva os jogos em dispositivos móves (e você) a novos níveis. É Você contra o mundo - só o forte sobrevive! ◈◈◈ Jogo #1 globalmente com mais de 500 milhões de jogos jogados ◈◈◈ Plague Inc. é um hit global com mais de meio milhão de classificações de 5 estrelas e reportagens em jornais como The Economist, New York Post, Boston Herald, The Guardian e London Metro! O desenvolvedor de Plague Inc. foi convidado a falar no CDC em Atlanta sobre os modelos de doenças do jogo! ▶ “O jogo cria um mundo convincente que engaja o público em tópicos sérios de saúde pública” – The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention ▶ “Melhor jogo para tablet de 2012” - New York Daily News ▶ “Plague Inc. vai captar sua atenção de todas as formas certas, e vai mantê-la” - Touch Arcade ▶ “Não há como negar o alto nível de qualidade de Plague Inc.” - Modojo ▶ “Plague Inc. não deveria ser tão divertido como é” – London Metro ▶ “Vai deixar você na esperança de destruir o mundo, tudo em nome de um pouco de diversão” – Pocket Lint ▶ “A jogabilidade de Plague Inc.'s é contagiosa” - Slide to Play ▶ Vencedor – “Melhor jogo do ano” – Pocket Gamer ▶ “Matar bilhões nunca foi tão divertido” – IGN ◈◈◈ Características: ● Lindos gráficos retina com uma interface bastante refinada (Contágio garantido) ● Mundo hiperrealistas, altamente detalhado, com IA avançada (Gerenciamento de epidemia) ● Sistema abrangente de ajudar e tutorial (Eu sou a lenda da ajuda) ● 12 diferentes tipos de doenças com estratégias radicalmente diferentes para dominar (12 Macacos?) ● Funcionalidade completa de Salvamento/Carregamento (28 salvamentos depois!) ● 50+ países para contaminar, centenas de caractetísticas para evoluir e milhares de eventos mundiais para se adaptar (Evolução pandêmica) ● Suporte total ao jogo ● Atualizações de expansão acrescentam o Verme Neurax que controla a mente, o Vírus Necroa que produz zumbis, Corridas de velocidade e Cenários da vida real! ● Você consegue salvar o mundo? Assuma o controle e vença uma doença mundial na nossa maior expansão! ● Enfrente as Doenças Diárias, ganhe melhorias poderosas e compita contra o mundo no Modo Surto! Traduzido para Inglês, Alemão, Espanhol, Português do Brasil, Italiano, Francês, Japonês, Coreano e Russo. (mais em breve) P.S. Dê um tapa nas suas costas se entendeu todos as referências da literatura do tema! Preço promocional especial para celebrar o fato de ser o 5º jogo de iPhone mais popular de 2015! ◈◈◈ Curta Plague Inc. no Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/PlagueInc Siga-me no Twitter: www.twitter.com/NdemicCreations

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 拒之-骚扰电话批量拦截助手
entry.id: 拒之-骚扰电话批量拦截助手-pt-1778990715380
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 0,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • 698包野果：99,99 €
  • 98包野果：17,99 €
  • 30包野果：5,99 €
  • 12包野果：1,99 €
  • 6包野果：0,99 €

Application Description

【功能特色】 1. 狐拒：自定义号段匹配规则，最多支持6位通配符 2. 狐云：基于大数据分析，一键拦截高频骚扰号段来电 3. 狐智：AI智能拦截，强力模式拦得多，普通模式拦得准 4. 基于已知号码库的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)已开启 5. 号码白名单，一键导入通讯录，重要来电不再被拒 6. iCloud自动同步，自定义号段云端存储，换机无忧 【使用限制】 1. 重要的事情只说一遍，不能拦截所有陌生号码，不能拦截区号下的所有号码，不能拦所有国际号码！ 2. 因系统来电阻止功能组件限制，自定义号段拦截号码数上限为200万个，通配符个数限制在6位及以下，因此不支持自定义区号的号段拦截。 3. 因国际号码不确定性因素较多，号段规律性较差，对于国际号码(非+86)、香港(+852)、澳门(+853)、台湾(+886)的来电受通配符个数限制无法按照号段拦截。狐智AI中提供的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)，是基于已知号码库实现的拦截，能够提供一定的拦截效果，但不能拦截所有国际号码。 4. 狐云大数据的“拦截XX开头号段”，为基于大数据收录的高频骚扰号段区域分类，并非将XX开头号码完全拦截。狐云列表中所有项目均可点击查看其具体拦截内容，已收录号段范围中的号码将会被拦截，未收录的则不会拦截。其中的高频骚扰号段、国际号码实际拦截效果依赖于用户的不断提交和对大数据的持续分析，您可以通过「号码提交」功能来帮助更多用户识别和自动拦截。 5. 狐智AI拦截的强力模式可大幅提高骚扰号码拦截率，但可能存在号码误判漏接，包括但不限于运营商、银行、快递、外卖员等电话号码，您可以切换到狐智AI拦截的普通模式，或使用号码白名单功能来避免拦截。 【内购项目】 1. 项目名称：6包野果（6元）、12包野果（12元）、30包野果（30元）、698包野果（698元） 2. 项目类型：消耗型项目 3. 项目说明：当您安装拒之App后，您已可以永久使用拒之的全部功能。如果您觉得我们做的好，可以在「支持我们」中通过内购项目来给我们鼓励，您的支持是拒之前行的动力。 4. 温馨提示：内购项目为消耗消费，1包野果为1元，购买成功后无法退款，请您适度鼓励、理性消费。 【隐私政策】 1.「拒之」采用iOS原生支持的来电阻止框架开发，不会主动收集您的任何信息。 2.「拒之自定义」中的拦截规则、拦截号码均由您自主设定。 3.「狐云大数据」、「狐智AI拦截」在使用时需要请求网络权限以获取后台数据，但不会收集您的个人信息。 4.「iCloud自动同步」功能使用iOS提供的用户个人隐私空间存储您的号段和设置数据，与您的AppleID绑定，他人无权访问。 5. 如果您自愿使用「号码提交」功能向我们提交号码样本，则仅会收集您提交的号码数据，此外不会上传其他任何信息，如果您自愿提交号码样本，则表示您同意开发者以任意方式处理该样本，包括但不限于进行大数据分析、共享给其他用户作为拦截号段参考等。

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Skel and Defense
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：1,99 € → 0,99 € [0,99 € ~ 1,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Blessing of Experience：1,99 €
  • Skin Ticket x1：0,49 €
  • Skin Ticket x3：0,99 €
  • Skin Ticket x8：2,99 €

Application Description

◆ Dive into the ultimate dungeon defense experience with 'Skel&Defense! ◆ ◆ Command Your Dungeon, Defend Your Territory! Ever dreamed of being the mastermind behind a formidable dungeon? Now's your chance! Strategically fend off relentless waves of heroes by day and unleash your devious trap layouts by night. It's your dungeon, your rules! ◆Unleash Chaos with a Variety of Traps! With a whopping 26 trap rooms at your disposal, the possibilities are endless! From fiery infernos to icy spikes, poison darts, and electrifying shockwaves, craft the ultimate labyrinth of doom to thwart intruders! ◆ Transform and Conquer with Skel Warriors! Not content with just traps? Harness the power of Skel warriors! Command mage skels, stealthy rogue skels, and stalwart shield skels to turn the tide of battle in your favor! ◆ Conquer Challenging Stages and Endless Mode! Embark on an epic journey through five challenging stages, each with its own unique rewards! Then, test your limits in endless mode, where every wave is a new challenge waiting to be conquered! ◆ Customize Your Experience with Perks! Before each stage, choose from a variety of perks to tailor your gameplay experience! With over 20 unique perks to discover, every playthrough offers something new! ◆ Enhance Your Skills and Uncover Secrets! Clear waves, earn attribute points, and unlock powerful enhancements! Dive into the comprehensive encyclopedia to uncover hidden secrets and unlock new rooms, synergies, and artifacts! ◆ Value-Packed Gaming Guaranteed! We're committed to delivering top-notch entertainment at an unbeatable price! Try it risk-free, and if it doesn't suit your taste, simply request a refund. Your satisfaction is our priority! Don't miss out on the adventure – download 'Skel&Defense' now and become the ultimate dungeon master!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: FoodyLife: The Food Diary App
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：1,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 1,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

You will be able to explore your eating habits visually and improve your eating habits. No calories and no numbers are shown in the app! Features: + Beautifully minimalist food diary app + In-App Camera And Filter + No calories No Pressure + Visualizes all your diets and shows your diet balance clearly! + Crazy and Interactive Foody Face + Learn how to eat mindfully and correctly right now! Don’t make Foody Face angry! Tap download right now! ---------- The inspiration behind FoodyLife is that nowadays people pay little attention to what they eat and often eat unhealthy food. Although there are many similar apps on the market (e.g. Fitness App, Calorie counter...), most of them focus mainly on “numbers”, such as how many calories the user has eaten and how long the user should exercise to get rid of those calories, or sending the user notifications when they should get up to exercise or if they have eaten too much. FoodyLife’ is an app that helps users track their daily diet by allowing them to keep their own food diary. The app shows neither calories nor numbers; instead, users have only to take a picture, enter their diet information, then they are able their overall diet balance. It is very simple and highly effective. Users can explore their eating habits visually, improving self-consciousness about eating habits.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: 7Days : Backer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 0,49 € [0,49 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,49 €

Application Description

Vocês já está cansado das mesas velhas histórias? Você está interessado em jogos narrativos, romances gráficos, jogos baseados em chat e jogos indie, mas você está cansado da mesma coisa? Se sim, você deveria checar '7Days', um jogo de mistério com romance gráfico e baseado em decisões. '7Days' é um jogo narrativo de mistério com romance gráfico. É um jogo narrativo único baseado em decisões onde o usuário pode criar suas histórias baseadas na escolha que ele fizer. Nós fornecemos a melhor experiência de um jogo narrativo com um enredo de mistério em estilo bate papo, projetado para dispositivos móveis. É um jogo altamente recomendado para você. ■ Jogo explicado Toda escolha muda a sua história. Cada pequena escolha irá mudar seu relacionamento com seus companheiros, e altera seu destino e de seus companheiros nos momentos críticos. Você pode ser o vilão ou um companheiro de confiança. Tudo depende de suas escolhas. ■ Resumo Existem espíritos que foram colocados ao testa para ressurreição no mundo da morte. O mensageiro da morte os atribuiu com a tarefa de se atacarem ou trabalharem juntos. Seu personagem, Kirell, deve completar tambés as tarefas baseadas em escolhas que lhe foram atribuídas. Mas suas tarefas necessitam que outros morram... Você só tem 7 dias O que você irá escolher? Experimente está história que provoca a imaginação agora mesmo. ■ Características do jogo - Estilo quadrinho com gráficos incríveis - Enredo único que alterna entre a vida e a morte - O enredo muda de acordo com suas escolhas - Várias conquistas e desafios ocultos - Episódios e finais diferentes baseados na história - Aventura de texto com uma sensação misteriosa - Enredo excitante ■ Recomendado para aqueles que: - Estão interessados em conteúdo/texto interativo como romances gráficos, jogos narrativos, jogos de bate papo e jogos sociais - São apaixonados por jogos indie como 'Undertale' - Estão procurando por uma jogo narrativo com elementos de mistério e/ou terror - Estão procurando por O jogo e estão cansados dos jogos narrativos de sempre - Estão interessados em diferentes tipos de jogos de aventura Nós também recomendamos 'Underworld Office: Ghost Game', outro de nossos grandes jogos. ■ Nós garantimos a diversão. Baixe e experimente agora Se você encontrar algum problema ou tem alguma sugestão, por favor, envie para nós em help@buffstudio.com. Nós trabalhamos duro para fazer os melhores jogos de aventura, narrativos, indie, restauradores e romances gráficos. ■ Nós precisamos da sua ajuda para fazer jogos narrativos melhores. Por favor, recomende este jogo narrativo para sua família e amigos. Será de grande ajuda para nós.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Sun Seeker - Tracker & Compass
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：12,99 € → 9,99 € [9,99 € ~ 12,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：9,99 €

Application Description

Sun Seeker is a comprehensive solar tracking & compass app. It shows the sun’s hourly direction intervals, its equinoxes, winter & summer solstice paths, sunrise & sunset times, twilight times, shadowed periods, UV Index, solar irradiance, golden and blue hours, eclipses & more. The app allows you to add sun-event notifications & has a widget and watch app showing the day’s solar data & position on an arc. The 3D View shows the solar direction for each sunlight hour. Sun Seeker has both a flat compass view & a 3D Augmented Reality (AR) view to show the solar position & path. The app is useful for - ▶ Photographers- to plan shoots according to the golden hour or blue hour & optimal sunlight conditions, sunrise & sunset times & directions. ▶ Cinematographers- enables you to find the solar exposure, directions, shadow, sunrise & sunset times for any location. ▶ Real Estate Buyers- can use the app before buying a property to check the sun's path & to find the solar exposure of properties. ▶ Drivers - Sun Seeker lets you track the sun path & movement during the days & helps drivers know the sun position to find how long the car will remain in the shade at any given parking spot. ▶ Campers & Picnickers- for anyone planning a day out, this app will help in finding where to camp, sit or pitch an umbrella depending on the sunlight & sun direction. ▶ Gardeners- Sun Seeker can also help with finding optimal planting locations & seasonal sunlight hours as a sunrise calendar ▶ Architects & Surveyors- for visualising the spatial variability of the solar angle throughout the year & using the compass app as a sun surveyor & calendar to determine the sunlight directions. Main Features * Sun Seeker is a sun locator which uses GPS, magnetometer & gyroscope to find the correct solar position & sun path for your current location. * Flat compass view shows current solar position, diurnal solar angle & elevation (separated into day & night segments), sun shadow length ratio, atmospheric path thickness. * 3D augmented reality (AR) camera overlay view shows the sun's current position, and it's path with hour points marked. You can scroll through time to preview changes throughout the year or day, and an optional pointer to guide you towards the current location of the sun & help you find the sun's direction. * Map view shows solar direction arrows, sun path & elevations for each hour of the day. * Choose any date to view sun position & path on that day. You can view sunset & sunrise times for each day as well. * Choose any location on earth (includes 40,000+ cities or custom locations available offline, as well as a comprehensive online map search capability). * Get additional details including sunrise, sunset & culmination times, maximum elevation, civil, nautical & astronomical twilight periods of the sun. * Optional device notifications for all manner of sun-related periods & events, such as golden hour or blue hour, various twilight periods, or sun crossing a given compass heading or elevation. The Sun Seeker app has been featured in numerous high-profile blogs, websites & publications, including Wall Street Journal, Washington Post, Sydney Morning Herald etc. "Truly amazing", "Incredible", "Brilliant - the most genuinely useful application of augmented reality - ever!" Check out our YouTube video here: https://bit.ly/2Rf0CkO Simply search YouTube for "Sun Seeker app" to find many videos, websites & blogs created by our enthusiastic users FAQs * See https://bit.ly/2FIPJq2 - also easily accessible from the app's info screen Note * The compass accuracy depends on having an undistorted magnetic field around your device. If you use it close to metallic objects or electrical equipment, directional accuracy may be impaired. The device’s compass accuracy can be optimised by calibrating it prior to use. See app’s FAQs for more help.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: GenChord - Escala de Piano
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 3,99 € [3,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：3,99 €

Application Description

Desta vez, você pode aprender acordes e escalas visualmente. Explore a estrutura dos acordes movendo diferentes notas de cada acorde. Você obterá uma compreensão completa da origem dos nomes dos acordes. Este aplicativo pode gerar toda a estrutura de acordes que você imaginar, facilitando consultá-los e memorizá-los. O processo de entender música deve ser claro e simples. O GenChord ajuda você a descobrir os princípios essenciais por trás da música. · Biblioteca – Consulta rápida de acordes Gere todos os acordes possíveis a partir da perspectiva da teoria musical — sem precisar se perguntar se a lista está completa. Toque para ouvir o acorde, pressione longamente para arpejar, deslize para a direita para ver detalhes. · Query – Consulta: Busca reversa de acordes. Busca reversa para acordes básicos / acordes omitidos / acordes invertidos / todos os acordes com tensões adicionadas. No Playground, também são suportadas conexões via Bluetooth e cabo MIDI. Agora você pode aproveitar recursos que antes estavam disponíveis apenas para usuários de PC. · Criar – Seus próprios acordes Colete e organize progressões de acordes. Aproveite mais recursos de controle, adicione curvas de memória e inclua notação numérica. Reorganize e combine livremente — um acorde pode evoluir em variações infinitas. Seu assistente de pop/jazz — você merece. · Playground – Caixa de música Para ensino, treino e testes — seu espaço livre para tocar música e sua ferramenta multifuncional para criação. Altamente recomendado: o recurso Acordes Diatônicos para explorar progressões bonitas. Toque a qualquer hora e lugar para disparar notas inspiradoras.
